description:
Legal record (#34) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 5r-v of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the middle third of Adar II 5453 CE, which is 1693 CE. 

(Document #34) Real estate rental transaction document for two upper-story apartments that also deals with improvements/renovations to the properties. The transactors' surnames are listed as Yisraʾel Barūkhʾel, Moshe Ben-.āṭr(?), and Mazal bt. Aharon Dasa/Rasa, the latter's wife. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
